requirement_topic.en: KEPCO Distributed-Generation Interconnection — Distribution Grid Technical Criteria
requirement_topic.zh: KEPCO 分布式电源并网——配电系统联接技术标准
requirement_topic.zht: KEPCO 分散式電源併網——配電系統聯接技術標準

summary.en: Connecting a grid-tied PV inverter system in South Korea requires project-level acceptance by Korea Electric Power Corporation (KEPCO) under the distributed-generation distribution-system interconnection technical criteria (분산형전원 배전계통 연계 기술기준) and KEPCO interconnection procedures. The review covers protection coordination, voltage and frequency operating settings, anti-islanding, power quality, reverse power, and system-impact limits. Product KC certification does not itself grant grid-connection approval.
summary.zh: 在韩国将并网光伏逆变器系统接入电网，须依据 KEPCO《分布式电源配电系统联接技术标准》（분산형전원 배전계통 연계 기술기준）及 KEPCO 并网程序取得项目层面的认可。审查内容包括保护配合、电压和频率运行设定、防孤岛、电能质量、反向潮流及系统影响限制。产品 KC 认证本身并不授予并网批准。
summary.zht: 在韓國將併網光伏逆變器系統接入電網，須依據 KEPCO《分散式電源配電系統聯接技術標準》（분산형전원 배전계통 연계 기술기준）及 KEPCO 併網程序取得項目層面的認可。審查內容包括保護配合、電壓和頻率運行設定、防孤島、電能質量、反向潮流及系統影響限制。產品 KC 認證本身並不授予併網批准。

standards_or_laws: KEPCO distributed-generation distribution-system interconnection technical criteria (분산형전원 배전계통 연계 기술기준)
KEPCO interconnection application and technical review procedures

summary.en: China uses GB/T 19964-2024, GB/T 37408-2019, NB/T 32004-2018, and utility connection agreements with State Grid or China Southern Power Grid. These documents show Chinese grid-code alignment but do not bind KEPCO or replace Korean project review.
summary.zh: 中国使用 GB/T 19964-2024、GB/T 37408-2019、NB/T 32004-2018 及国家电网或南方电网并网协议。这些文件可显示中国电网规范符合性，但不约束 KEPCO，也不能替代韩国项目审查。
summary.zht: 中國使用 GB/T 19964-2024、GB/T 37408-2019、NB/T 32004-2018 及國家電網或南方電網併網協議。這些文件可顯示中國電網規範符合性，但不約束 KEPCO，也不能替代韓國項目審查。

gap.en: Korean interconnection is a separate utility gate. A China grid-code type test must be rechecked against KEPCO settings and the project point of common coupling. Firmware protection settings, Korean frequency/voltage windows, islanding behavior, and power-quality evidence should be prepared for KEPCO review.
gap.zh: 韩国并网是独立的电力公司准入门槛。中国电网规范型式试验须按 KEPCO 设定和项目公共连接点重新核查。应准备固件保护设定、韩国频率/电压窗口、防孤岛行为及电能质量证据供 KEPCO 审查。
gap.zht: 韓國併網是獨立的電力公司准入門檻。中國電網規範型式試驗須按 KEPCO 設定和項目公共連接點重新核查。應準備韌體保護設定、韓國頻率/電壓窗口、防孤島行為及電能質量證據供 KEPCO 審查。

mandatory_status.eu: Mandatory for grid connection — KEPCO acceptance is required before the system is connected to the distribution network.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory in practice through Chinese utility interconnection agreements, but not transferable to KEPCO approval.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] KC product certification and Chinese grid-code evidence are not enough for energization in Korea; KEPCO interconnection acceptance must be handled separately.
compliance_verdict.zh: 【仅供参考】KC 产品认证和中国并网证据不足以在韩国送电；必须单独完成 KEPCO 并网认可。
compliance_verdict.zht: 【僅供參考】KC 產品認證和中國併網證據不足以在韓國送電；必須單獨完成 KEPCO 併網認可。
